title: EXAMPLE REMINDER — replace this file with your repo's own rules.
message: This is the vendor-neutral example for tools/keyword-reminder.mjs.
Each rule fires when any of its patterns matches the user prompt, and
prepends this message to the conversation as a reminder.
Pattern strings default to case-insensitive; use the {"re", "flags"} form
to override (e.g. "flags": "" for a case-sensitive acronym).
Copy the engine into your repo, drop a real keyword-reminders.json next to
it, and wire it as a UserPromptSubmit hook. Add reminders by editing the
